chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.04 of 2018 Cresent Bahria Cadet College & another Versus Ahmed Raza Khan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 22/18 Dated: 20.02.2024 Mr. Danish Ghazi for appellants. Mr. Khalid Jawed for respondent No.1 along with respondent No.1 in person. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Without prejudice to the merits of the case, it is a proposal of Mr. Khalid Jawed, learned counsel appearing for respondent No.1, that in case appellant is desirous of examining the witness namely R.Z. Kiyani whose name was not disclosed in the list of witnesses, he (the witness) may appear on a particular/specific date for the purpose of his examination and cross-examination before the learned Commissioner who was appointed to examine the witnesses of the parties. In case the said witness fails to appear on the particular date, as suggested by this Court, then the side may be closed. Mr. Danish Ghazi, learned counsel appearing for the appellant concedes to the proposal and suggests the date to be 09.03.2024, which date is agreed by Mr. Khalid Jawed. Order accordingly. Let the said witness may appear on the aforesaid said date for his examination/cross-examination around 11:00 a.m. subject to availability of Commissioner. High Court Appeal stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge
